name: Basic query
query:
PREFIX omecore: <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/core/>
PREFIX omens:   <http://www.openmicroscopy.org/ns/default/>
PREFIX rdfs:    <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX omegk:   <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/omekg#>

SELECT DISTINCT
       ?project
       ?dataset
       ?image
       ?image_name
       ?detail
WHERE {
    ?project a omecore:Project ;
             dcterms:hasPart ?dataset .

    ?dataset a omecore:Dataset ;
             dcterms:hasPart ?image .

    ?image a omecore:Image ;
           rdfs:label ?image_name ;
           omegk:ome_details ?detail_iri .

    # Convert the IRI to a string (for qlever-ui)
    BIND(STR(?detail_iri) AS ?detail)
}

name: Json and downloadable image
Annotations for specific image
image search by generic annotation value
query:
PREFIX omecore: <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/core/>
PREFIX dc:      <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
PREFIX rdfs:    <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX omegk:   <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/omekg#>

SELECT DISTINCT
  ?image_id
  ?image_name
  ?detail
WHERE {

  #####################################################################
  #  Find image resources and retrieve their basic metadata
  #####################################################################
  ?image a omecore:Image ;
         dc:identifier ?image_id ;
         rdfs:label ?image_name ;
         omegk:ome_details ?detail_iri ;
         omecore:hasAnnotation ?ann .

  #####################################################################
  #  Follow MapAnnotations attached to each image
  #    - MapAnnotations store metadata as key/value pairs
  #####################################################################
  ?ann a omecore:MapAnnotation ;
       omecore:mapEntry ?entry .

  # Each entry is one key/value pair
  ?entry omecore:key ?key ;
         omecore:value ?value .

  #####################################################################
  #  FILTER: choose which annotation to search for
  #
  # ⚠️ IMPORTANT:
  #    - we use LCASE(...) for case-insensitive matching
  #    - therefore BOTH sides must be lowercase
  #
  # Examples:
  #   gene = Fgf8  → use "gene" + "fgf8"
  #   dye  = Dapi  → use "dye"  + "dapi"
  #####################################################################
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?key)) = "gene")
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?value)) = "fgf8")

  #####################################################################
  # Convert link to string for display in qlever-ui
  #####################################################################
  BIND(STR(?detail_iri) AS ?detail)
}
ORDER BY ?image_id

name: Federated: Images by gene annotation to uniprot protein
query:
PREFIX omecore: <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/core/>
PREFIX dc:      <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
PREFIX omegk:   <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/omekg#>
PREFIX up:      <http://purl.uniprot.org/core/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>

SELECT DISTINCT
  ?image_id
  ?image_name
  ?detail
  ?geneLabel
  ?protein
WHERE {

  #####################################################################
  # What to edit
  # - First line: annotation key (e.g. "gene", "genotype", "dye")
  # - Second line: annotation value (always lowercase!)
  # Examples:
  #   gene      + fgf8
  #   genotype  + wspf
  #   dye       + dapi
  #####################################################################
  ?image a omecore:Image ;
         dc:identifier ?image_id ;
         rdfs:label ?image_name ;
         omegk:ome_details ?detail_iri ;
         omecore:hasAnnotation ?ann .

  ?ann a omecore:MapAnnotation ;
       omecore:mapEntry ?entry .

  ?entry omecore:key ?key ;
         omecore:value ?value .

  # Match annotation key (case-insensitive)
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?key)) = "gene")

  # IMPORTANT: must be written in lowercase
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?value)) = "fgf8")

  BIND(STR(?value) AS ?geneLabel)

  # Convert the OMERO.web detail IRI into a string for display
  BIND(STR(?detail_iri) AS ?detail)

  #####################################################################
  # REMOTE (UniProt): retrieve proteins encoded by that gene
  #
  # Endpoint:
  #   - Official: https://sparql.uniprot.org/sparql
  #   - Faster option: https://qlever.dev/api/uniprot
  #####################################################################
  SERVICE <https://sparql.uniprot.org/sparql> {
    ?protein a up:Protein ;
             up:encodedBy ?gene .

    # Match the gene label exactly as stored in UniProt
    ?gene skos:prefLabel ?geneLabel .
  }
}
ORDER BY ?image_id ?protein

name: Federated: Images by annotation to gene and protein
query:
PREFIX omecore: <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/core/>
PREFIX dc:      <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
PREFIX omegk:   <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/omekg#>
PREFIX up:      <http://purl.uniprot.org/core/>
PREFIX skos:    <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX rdfs:    <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT
  ?image_id
  ?image_name
  ?detail_iri
  ?geneLabel
  ?gene
  ?protein
  ?proteinName
WHERE {

  #####################################################################
  # What to edit
  # - First line: annotation key (e.g. "gene", "genotype", "dye")
  # - Second line: annotation value (always lowercase!)
  # Examples:
  #   gene      + fgf8
  #   dye       + dapi
  #####################################################################
  ?image a omecore:Image ;
         dc:identifier ?image_id ;
         rdfs:label ?image_name ;
         omegk:ome_details ?detail_iri ;
         omecore:hasAnnotation ?ann .

  ?ann a omecore:MapAnnotation ;
       omecore:mapEntry ?entry .

  ?entry omecore:key ?key ;
         omecore:value ?value .

  # Match annotation key (case-insensitive)
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?key)) = "gene")

  # IMPORTANT: must be written in lowercase
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?value)) = "fgf8")

  BIND(STR(?value) AS ?geneLabel)

  #####################################################################
  # REMOTE (UniProt): retrieve the gene resource, proteins,
  # and recommended protein name
  #
  # Endpoint:
  #   - Faster option: https://qlever.dev/api/uniprot
  #   - Official:      https://sparql.uniprot.org/sparql
  #####################################################################
  SERVICE <https://qlever.dev/api/uniprot> {
    ?protein a up:Protein ;
             up:encodedBy ?gene .

    # Match the gene label exactly as stored in UniProt
    ?gene skos:prefLabel ?geneLabel .

    # Optional: retrieve protein name
    OPTIONAL {
      ?protein up:recommendedName ?recName .
      ?recName up:fullName ?proteinName .
    }
  }
}
ORDER BY ?image_id ?protein

name: Federated: Images by annotation to uniprot GO terms
query:
PREFIX omecore: <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/core/>
PREFIX dc:      <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
PREFIX omegk:   <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/omekg#>
PREFIX up:      <http://purl.uniprot.org/core/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>

SELECT DISTINCT
  ?image_id
  ?image_name
  ?detail
  ?geneLabel
  ?protein
  ?goTerm
WHERE {

  #####################################################################
  # What to edit
  # - First line: annotation key (e.g. "gene", "genotype", "dye")
  # - Second line: annotation value (always lowercase!)
  #
  # Examples:
  #   gene      + fgf8
  #   dye       + dapi
  #####################################################################
  ?image a omecore:Image ;
         dc:identifier ?image_id ;
         rdfs:label ?image_name ;
         omegk:ome_details ?detail_iri ;
         omecore:hasAnnotation ?ann .

  ?ann a omecore:MapAnnotation ;
       omecore:mapEntry ?entry .

  ?entry omecore:key ?key ;
         omecore:value ?value .

  # Match annotation key (case-insensitive)
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?key)) = "gene")

  # IMPORTANT: must be written in lowercase
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?value)) = "fgf8")

  #####################################################################
  # LOCAL RESULT
  # This preserves the exact casing (e.g. "Fgf8", "wspF")
  #####################################################################
  BIND(STR(?value) AS ?geneLabel)

  # Convert the OMERO.web detail link to a string for display
  BIND(STR(?detail_iri) AS ?detail)

  #####################################################################
  # REMOTE (UniProt): retrieve proteins and GO terms
  #
  # IMPORTANT:
  # - We use the original value (?geneLabel) for matching
  # - Do NOT uppercase it, because some gene names are mixed-case
  #
  # Endpoint:
  #   - Official: https://sparql.uniprot.org/sparql
  #   - Faster option: https://qlever.dev/api/uniprot
  #####################################################################
  SERVICE <https://qlever.dev/api/uniprot> {
    ?protein a up:Protein ;
             up:encodedBy ?gene ;
             up:classifiedWith ?goTerm .

    # Match the gene label exactly as stored in UniProt
    ?gene skos:prefLabel ?geneLabel .
  }
}
ORDER BY ?image_id ?protein ?goTerm

name: Federated: Images by annotation to uniprot gene, protein and GO terms
query:
PREFIX omecore: <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/core/>
PREFIX dc:      <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
PREFIX omegk:   <https://ld.openmicroscopy.org/omekg#>
PREFIX up:      <http://purl.uniprot.org/core/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>

SELECT DISTINCT
  ?image_id
  ?image_name
  ?detail_iri
  ?geneLabel
  ?gene
  ?protein
  ?proteinName
  ?goTerm
  ?goLabel
WHERE {
  #####################################################################
  # What to edit
  #
  # - First line: annotation key (e.g. "gene", "genotype", "dye")
  # - Second line: annotation value (always lowercase!)
  # Examples:
  #   gene      + fgf8
  #   genotype  + wspf
  #####################################################################
  ?image a omecore:Image ;
         dc:identifier ?image_id ;
         rdfs:label ?image_name ;
         omegk:ome_details ?detail_iri ;
         omecore:hasAnnotation ?ann .

  ?ann a omecore:MapAnnotation ;
       omecore:mapEntry ?entry .

  ?entry omecore:key ?key ;
         omecore:value ?value .

  # Match annotation key (case-insensitive)
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?key)) = "gene")

  # IMPORTANT: must be written in lowercase
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?value)) = "fgf8")

  #####################################################################
  # LOCAL RESULT: keep original value as stored in OMERO
  # This preserves the exact casing (e.g. "wspF", "Fgf8")
  #####################################################################
  BIND(STR(?value) AS ?geneLabel)

  #####################################################################
  # REMOTE (UniProt): retrieve proteins and GO annotations
  # IMPORTANT:
  # - We use the original value (?geneLabel) for matching
  # - Do NOT uppercase it (UCASE), because some gene names
  #   are case-sensitive (e.g. "wspF")
  #
  # Endpoint:
  #   - Official: https://sparql.uniprot.org/sparql
  #   - Faster option: https://qlever.dev/api/uniprot
  #####################################################################
  SERVICE <https://sparql.uniprot.org/sparql> {

    # Proteins encoded by the gene
    ?protein a up:Protein ;
             up:encodedBy ?gene ;
             up:classifiedWith ?goTerm .

    # Match the gene label exactly as stored in UniProt
    ?gene skos:prefLabel ?geneLabel .

    # Optional: retrieve protein name
    OPTIONAL {
      ?protein up:recommendedName ?recName .
      ?recName up:fullName ?proteinName .
    }

    # Optional: retrieve GO term label (human-readable)
    OPTIONAL {
      ?goTerm rdfs:label ?goLabel .
    }
  }
}
ORDER BY ?image_id ?protein ?goTerm
